lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰਸਿਖ ਗੁਰੂ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਸੁਣਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis no deaal hovai meraa suaamee tis gurasikh guroo upades sunaavai |
lines.english: That person, unto whom my Lord and Master is kind and compassionate - upon that GurSikh, the Guru's Teachings are bestowed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਇਦੇ ਸੇ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਥੋੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: jo tudh sach dhiaaeide se virale thorre |
lines.english: Those who meditate on You, O True Lord - they are very rare.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਧੂੜਿ ਮੰਗੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਗੁਰਸਿਖ ਕੀ ਜੋ ਆਪਿ ਜਪੈ ਅਵਰਹ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak dhoorr mangai tis gurasikh kee jo aap japai avarah naam japaavai |2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak begs for the dust of the feet of that GurSikh, who himself chants the Naam, and inspires others to chant it. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਮਨਿ ਚਿਤਿ ਇਕੁ ਅਰਾਧਦੇ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਬਰਕਤਿ ਖਾਹਿ ਅਸੰਖ ਕਰੋੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: jo man chit ik araadhade tin kee barakat khaeh asankh karorre |
lines.english: Those who worship and adore the One Lord in their conscious minds - through their generosity, countless millions are fed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁਨੋ ਸਭ ਧਿਆਇਦੀ ਸੇ ਥਾਇ ਪਏ ਜੋ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਲੋੜੇ ॥
lines.translit: tudhuno sabh dhiaaeidee se thaae pe jo saahib lorre |
lines.english: All meditate on You, but they alone are accepted, who are pleasing to their Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਹਾਜਰੁ ਮਿਠਾ ਬੋਲਦੇ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਵਿਸੁ ਕਢਹਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਘੋਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: oe haajar mitthaa bolade baahar vis kadteh mukh ghole |
lines.english: In His Sublime Presence, they talk sweetly, but behind His back, they exude poison from their mouths.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਖਾਦੇ ਪੈਨਦੇ ਸੇ ਮੁਏ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੇ ਕੋੜ੍ਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: jo bin satigur seve khaade painade se mue mar jame korrhe |
lines.english: Those who eat and dress without serving the True Guru die; after death, those wretched lepers are consigned to reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲੁ ਜੂਈ ਭਰਿਆ ਨੀਲਾ ਕਾਲਾ ਖਿਧੋਲੜਾ ਤਿਨਿ ਵੇਮੁਖਿ ਵੇਮੁਖੈ ਨੋ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mal jooee bhariaa neelaa kaalaa khidholarraa tin vemukh vemukhai no paaeaa |
lines.english: The faithless baymukh sent out his faithless servant, wearing a blue-black coat, filled with filth and vermin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਖੋਟੇ ਦਯਿ ਵਿਛੋੜੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: man khotte day vichhorre |11|
lines.english: The evil-minded are consigned to separation from the Lord. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਸਿ ਨ ਦੇਈ ਕੋਈ ਬਹਣਿ ਜਗਤ ਮਹਿ ਗੂਹ ਪੜਿ ਸਗਵੀ ਮਲੁ ਲਾਇ ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: paas na deee koee behan jagat meh gooh parr sagavee mal laae manamukh aaeaa |
lines.english: No one in the world will sit near him; the self-willed manmukh fell into manure, and returned with even more filth covering him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਾਈ ਜੋ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਚੁਗਲੀ ਨੋ ਵੇਮੁਖੁ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਭੇਜਿਆ ਓਥੈ ਭੀ ਮੁਹੁ ਕਾਲਾ ਦੁਹਾ ਵੇਮੁਖਾ ਦਾ ਕਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: paraaee jo nindaa chugalee no vemukh kar kai bhejiaa othai bhee muhu kaalaa duhaa vemukhaa daa karaaeaa |
lines.english: The faithless baymukh was sent to slander and back-bite others, but when he went there, the faces of both he and his faithless master were blackened instead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੜ ਸੁਣਿਆ ਸਭਤੁ ਜਗਤ ਵਿਚਿ ਭਾਈ ਵੇਮੁਖੁ ਸਣੈ ਨਫਰੈ ਪਉਲੀ ਪਉਦੀ ਫਾਵਾ ਹੋਇ ਕੈ ਉਠਿ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tarr suniaa sabhat jagat vich bhaaee vemukh sanai nafarai paulee paudee faavaa hoe kai utth ghar aaeaa |
lines.english: It was immediately heard throughout the whole world, O Siblings of Destiny, that this faithless man, along with his servant, was kicked and beaten with shoes; in humiliation, they got up and returned to their homes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਸੰਗਤੀ ਕੁੜਮੀ ਵੇਮੁਖੁ ਰਲਣਾ ਨ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾ ਵਹੁਟੀ ਭਤੀਜਂ‍ੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਣਿ ਘਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: agai sangatee kurramee vemukh ralanaa na milai taa vahuttee bhateejanee fir aan ghar paaeaa |
lines.english: The faithless baymukh was not allowed to mingle with others; his wife and niece then brought him home to lie down.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲਤੁ ਪਲਤੁ ਦੋਵੈ ਗਏ ਨਿਤ ਭੁਖਾ ਕੂਕੇ ਤਿਹਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: halat palat dovai ge nit bhukhaa kooke tihaaeaa |
lines.english: He has lost both this world and the next; he cries out continually, in hunger and thirst.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਨਿਆਉ ਸਚੁ ਬਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan suaamee karataa purakh hai jin niaau sach beh aap karaaeaa |
lines.english: Blessed, blessed is the Creator, the Primal Being, our Lord and Master; He Himself sits and dispenses true justice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਕਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਸੋ ਸਾਚੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਪਚਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo nindaa kare satigur poore kee so saachai maar pachaaeaa |
lines.english: One who slanders the Perfect True Guru is punished and destroyed by the True Lord.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਨੰਗਾ ਭੁਖਾ ਹੋਵੈ ਤਿਸ ਦਾ ਨਫਰੁ ਕਿਥਹੁ ਰਜਿ ਖਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: saahib jis kaa nangaa bhukhaa hovai tis daa nafar kithahu raj khaae |
lines.english: One who has a poor beggar for a master - how can he be well-fed?

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਅਖਰੁ ਤਿਨਿ ਆਖਿਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਜਗਤੁ ਸਭੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ehu akhar tin aakhiaa jin jagat sabh upaaeaa |1|
lines.english: This Word is spoken by the One who created the whole universe. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਵਥੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਨਫਰੈ ਹਥਿ ਆਵੈ ਅਣਹੋਦੀ ਕਿਥਹੁ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: ji saahib kai ghar vath hovai su nafarai hath aavai anahodee kithahu paae |
lines.english: If there is something in his master's house, he can get it; but how can he get what is not there?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਸਫਲ ਦਰਸਨ ਕੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੈ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sevaa karahu har gur safal darasan kee fir lekhaa mangai na koee |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, serve the Guru, the Lord Incarnate; the Blessed Vision of His Darshan is profitable, and in the end, you shall not be called to account. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਦੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਕੀਤੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਸਾ ਸੇਵਾ ਅਉਖੀ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis dee sevaa keetee fir lekhaa mangeeai saa sevaa aaukhee hoee |
lines.english: Serving him, who will be called to answer for his account? That service is painful and useless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵੀਚਾਰਹਿ ਸੰਤ ਜਨ ਚਾਰਿ ਵੇਦ ਕਹੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak veechaareh sant jan chaar ved kahande |
lines.english: O Nanak, the Saints consider, and the four Vedas proclaim,

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤ ਮੁਖੈ ਤੇ ਬੋਲਦੇ ਸੇ ਵਚਨ ਹੋਵੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat mukhai te bolade se vachan hovande |
lines.english: that whatever the Lord's devotees utter with their mouths, shall come to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਨਿ ਮੁਗਧ ਨਰ ਸੰਤ ਨਾਲਿ ਖਹੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: sukh na paaein mugadh nar sant naal khahande |
lines.english: The stubborn men who fight with the Saints shall never find peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਪਹਾਰਾ ਜਾਪਦਾ ਸਭਿ ਲੋਕ ਸੁਣੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: pragatt pahaaraa jaapadaa sabh lok sunande |
lines.english: He is manifest in His cosmic workshop. All people hear of this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਵਿਚਾਰੇ ਕਿਆ ਕਰਹਿ ਜਾ ਭਾਗ ਧੁਰਿ ਮੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: oe vichaare kiaa kareh jaa bhaag dhur mande |
lines.english: What can those wretched ones do, since, from the very beginning, their destiny is cursed with evil.

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਲੋਚਨਿ ਓਨਾ ਗੁਣੈ ਨੋ ਓਇ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਿ ਸੜੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: oe lochan onaa gunai no oe ahankaar sarrande |
lines.english: The Saints seek to bless them with virtue, but they only burn in their egos.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਮਾਰੇ ਤਿਨਿ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮਿ ਸੇ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਸੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: jo maare tin paarabraham se kisai na sande |
lines.english: Those who are struck down by the Supreme Lord God are of no use to anyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੈਰੁ ਕਰਹਿ ਨਿਰਵੈਰ ਨਾਲਿ ਧਰਮ ਨਿਆਇ ਪਚੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: vair kareh niravair naal dharam niaae pachande |
lines.english: Those who hate the One who has no hatred - according to the true justice of Dharma, they shall perish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਡੁ ਮੁੰਢਾਹੂੰ ਕਟਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਡਾਲ ਸੁਕੰਦੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: pedd mundtaahoon kattiaa tis ddaal sukande |12|
lines.english: When the tree is cut off at its roots, the branches wither and die. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜੋ ਸੰਤਿ ਸਰਾਪਿਆ ਸੇ ਫਿਰਹਿ ਭਵੰਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: jo jo sant saraapiaa se fireh bhavande |
lines.english: Those who are cursed by the Saints will continue wandering aimlessly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok Fourth Mehl:
